evidence_notes: 252-session daily backtest: 107/207 = 51.69%; weakest broad regime is gap-down days at 12/32 = 37.5%
Recent misses cluster on 2026-03-24 and 2026-03-30: both were bearish core scores that failed on upside reversal sessions
summary: Session 2026-03-31: upgraded backtest exporter to mirror 28-signal Core SSR; recent 60-session daily edge is weak while broader baseline remains modestly positive.

limitations: Daily and weekly outputs validate the 28 closed-bar Core SSR signals only.
Session-open and live-overlay signals are intentionally excluded from this exporter.
